tasks.label: Bump version and push tag
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; bump="${input:versionBumpType}"; branch=$(git branch --show-current); if [[ -z "$branch" ]]; then echo 'Detached HEAD detected. Checkout a branch before running this task.'; exit 1; fi; if [[ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]]; then echo 'Working tree is not clean. Commit, stash, or discard changes before bumping the version.'; git status --short; exit 1; fi; case "$bump" in major|minor|patch) ;; *) echo 'Invalid bump type. Use major, minor, or patch.'; exit 1 ;; esac; current_version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version"); next_version=$(node -e "const [maj,min,pat]=process.argv[1].split('.').map(Number); const bump=process.argv[2]; let v=[maj,min,pat]; if (bump==='major') v=[maj+1,0,0]; else if (bump==='minor') v=[maj,min+1,0]; else v=[maj,min,pat+1]; process.stdout.write(v.join('.'));" "$current_version" "$bump"); node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='package.json'; const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); data.version=process.argv[1]; fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) + '\n');" "$next_version"; npm i; git add package.json package-lock.json; git commit -m "bump version to $next_version"; git tag "v$next_version"; git push origin "HEAD:$branch" "refs/tags/v$next_version"
